document.title: Workflow Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Complete machine-readable catalog of all workflow extensions from Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2, including all state machines, transitions, guards, triggers, actions, SLA, NBA rules, events, and failure policies for 21 workflows

workflows.current_limitation: No matching engine or state machine exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_GENERIC_STATE_MACHINE — Implement Match entity with 10-state lifecycle and 5-dimension scoring engine

guards.name: all_scoring_dimensions_complete
guards.condition: All 5 scoring dimensions have been computed

guards.name: rank_in_top_10
guards.condition: Match is among top 10 for this project

actions.name: create_proposal
actions.description: Generate match proposal with score breakdown

actions.name: exclude_property
actions.description: Remove property from current match pool

NBA_rules.nba: Review match proposal or expand search criteria
Request rematch or update dossier criteria

failure_policy.scoring_failure: Retry (max 3), log error, transition to failed state
failure_policy.notification_failure: Queue retry (max 5), fallback to in-app notification
failure_policy.reminder_failure: Cron job health check, manual trigger available
failure_policy.database_transaction_conflict: Atomic transaction with rollback, retry on conflict

required_permissions: USER (holder): view matches for own properties, accept/reject
AGENT: view matches for assigned properties
ADMIN: view all matches, trigger rematch
required_states: Match.state ∈ {created, scored, proposed, demandeur_review, holder_review, double_consent_obtained, mise_en_relation_established, active, expired, archived}
workflows.human_decision_question: Matching algorithm design: rule-based (Gold) or ML-enhanced

workflows.source_concept: Mise en Relation / Contact Lifecycle (6 states)
workflows.current_limitation: V2 has conversation model but no contact workflow, no double consent, no holder decision tracking
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Contact entity with 6-state lifecycle; enforce double consent; add holder silence escalation with 3-tier reminder system

guards.name: match_proposed
guards.condition: Match exists and has been proposed to demandeur

guards.name: 7d_no_response
guards.condition: Demandeur did not respond within 7 days

guards.name: both_consented
guards.condition: Both demandeur and holder have given consent

guards.name: consent_valid
guards.condition: No consent withdrawal within validity period

actions.name: send_reminder
actions.description: Send silence reminder (1 at 24h, 2 at 48h, 3 at 72h)

SLA.escalation: Auto-expire if demandeur does not consent

NBA_rules.nba: Contact is now active — start conversation
Schedule a visit or send a message

failure_policy.consent_withdrawal: If either party withdraws before establishment, cancel contact
failure_policy.duplicate_contact_creation: Check existing active contact before creation

required_permissions: USER (demandeur): view own contacts, express interest
USER (holder): view contacts for own properties, accept/reject
AGENT: view contacts for assigned projects
ADMIN: view all contacts, force establish
required_states: Contact.state ∈ {created, demandeur_interested, holder_contacted, holder_favorable, consent_obtained, established, refused, expired}
workflows.human_decision_question: Double consent enforcement: mandatory for all contacts or configurable

workflows.current_limitation: No Visit entity or state machine in V2 (project step:visit is label only)
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Visit model with 9-state lifecycle; add scheduling, confirmation, no-show tracking, post-visit NBA

guards.name: visit_proposed
guards.condition: Visit has valid datetime, property, and participants

guards.name: visit_confirmed
guards.condition: Visit occurred (confirmed by party or agent)

guards.name: both_agree
guards.condition: Both parties agree to new datetime

NBA_rules.nba: Holder has been notified — awaiting confirmation

required_permissions: USER (demandeur): request visits, cancel own visits
AGENT: manage all visits for assigned projects
required_states: Visit.state ∈ {requested, awaiting_confirmation, confirmed, completed, rescheduled, cancelled, refused, absent_demandeur, absent_holder}

workflows.current_limitation: No Transaction entity or state machine in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Transaction model with 10-state lifecycle; add per-type document requirements; party involvement tracking; payment milestones

guards.name: all_documents_valid
guards.condition: All mandatory docs uploaded and validated

SLA.escalation: Reminder 3d before, breach at due date

failure_policy.payment_default: Apply penalty, offer cure period (7d), then fail
failure_policy.signature_refusal: Attempt mediation, then fail with reason

required_fields: Transaction.transaction_type: Enum (sale | rental | lease | commercial_lease | seasonal_rental | investment)
required_permissions: ADMIN: view all, force state change
required_states: Transaction.state ∈ {agreement, preparation, documents, payment, signature, handover, completed, failed, archived, cancelled, disputed}
workflows.human_decision_question: Transaction entity vs extended Project: separate model or project extension

workflows.current_limitation: No payment or service system exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_GENERIC_STATE_MACHINE — Implement ServiceOrder model with 8-state lifecycle and Payment model with 10-state sub-machine; integrate Campay payment processor

guards.name: acceptance_valid
guards.condition: Buyer agreed to price and terms

guards.name: retry_allowed
guards.condition: Retry count < max AND time since last > 5min

NBA_rules.nba: Service in use or expiring soon

required_permissions: ADMIN: view all orders, process refunds
required_states: ServiceOrder.state ∈ {creation, proposition, acceptation, paiement, activation, utilisation, expiration, archivage}
Payment.state ∈ {created, initiated, pending, confirmed, failed, cancelled, expired, refunded, reconciled, disputed}
workflows.human_decision_question: Payment processor, service catalog scope, pricing validation

workflows.current_limitation: No incident management system in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Incident model with 8-state lifecycle; 12 incident types; 4 priority levels (P0-P3)
workflows.human_decision_question: Incident priority levels and SLA thresholds

workflows.current_limitation: No mediation system exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Mediation model with 8-state lifecycle; define mediator role and boundaries; session management; offer/acceptance flow
workflows.human_decision_question: Mediation as built-in platform feature vs outsourced service

workflows.current_limitation: No CRM pipeline exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_GENERIC_STATE_MACHINE — Implement Lead model with 8-stage pipeline; scoring engine (base + 13 boosters - 8 penalties); 5-class classification; geographic routing engine; 4-layer anti-fraud

failure_policy.no_entity_extraction: Skip to intent with minimal data
failure_policy.no_agent_available: Expand to nearest zone, notify manager

workflows.human_decision_question: CRM pipeline automation level: fully automated or human-in-the-loop

workflows.current_limitation: No SIE publication pipeline exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Publication model with 11-state lifecycle; SIE reference code generation; campaign association; syndication to channels; performance monitoring

failure_policy.media_quality_fail: Flag specific issues, allow manual override

workflows.human_decision_question: SIE integration priority: required for MVP or Phase 3 enhancement

workflows.current_limitation: No redirection/click tracking pipeline in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Redirection model with 12-state lifecycle; bot detection; duplicate detection; geolocation; analytics enrichment; campaign attribution

workflows.current_limitation: No conversion attribution pipeline in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Conversion model with 12-state lifecycle; last-touch attribution; session identification; source/campaign mapping; commission calculation

failure_policy.attribution_model_error: Default to equal, flag for review

workflows.current_limitation: No agent invitation/onboarding workflow in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement AgentInvitation model with 7-state lifecycle; secure link generation; document validation; admin approval workflow
workflows.human_decision_question: Onboarding step requirements: all Gold steps or simplified flow

workflows.current_limitation: No identity resolution exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement IdentityResolution model with 5-state lifecycle; signal matching (phone 0.40, email 0.35, name 0.15, device 0.10); auto-merge at >= 0.90 + phone match; human review at 0.70-0.89
workflows.human_decision_question: Identity resolution automation level and false positive handling

workflows.current_limitation: V2 has no orchestrator; workflows are distributed across project, property, conversation models
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_GENERIC_STATE_MACHINE — Implement orchestrator workflow engine that delegates to sub-workflows (Qualification → Matching → Contact → Visit → Negotiation → Transaction → Closure). Generic engine pattern reusable across entities.

failure_policy.user_inactivity: NBA reminders, auto-archive after max inactivity

workflows.human_decision_question: Orchestrator implementation: workflow engine vs event-driven choreography

workflows.current_limitation: V2 has 5 statuses (draft, open, closed, published, archived) — no enrichment or commercial pipeline
workflows.proposed_structure: EXTEND_CURRENT — Extend Property state machine from 5 to 13 states covering enrichment pipeline: reception → normalization → classification → validation → publication → matching → visit → negotiation → transaction → completion → archive/conserve/delete
workflows.human_decision_question: State granularity: full 13-step or key additions

workflows.current_limitation: V2 has Project with 5 statuses, no matching/consent logic
workflows.proposed_structure: EXTEND_CURRENT — Extend Project state machine from 5 to 14 states covering full dossier lifecycle: creation → qualification → matching → presentation → wait_demandeur → wait_holder → mise_en_relation → visit → negotiation → agreement → transaction → closure → archive → cancelled
workflows.human_decision_question: Dossier state granularity: 14 states or simplified

workflows.current_limitation: V2 has conversation_domain with basic negotiation stages (interest → negotiation → agreement → closed)
workflows.proposed_structure: ENRICH_CURRENT — Enrich current negotiation stages with offer/counter-offer tracking, negotiable elements per transaction type, silent-reminder system (48h/96h/168h/240h), and post-failure diagnostic

failure_policy.silence_at_96h: Send second reminder with counter-offer prompt

workflows.current_limitation: V2 has flat journey steps with no progressive disclosure order
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_GENERIC_STATE_MACHINE — Implement ordered qualification wizard with 10-step progressive disclosure: Intention → Type → Ville → Quartier → Budget → Délai → Critères → Préférences → Confirmation → Escalade. Channel-adaptive (WhatsApp: 1 question, Telegram: 2-3, Dashboard: full).

workflows.current_limitation: No structured agent onboarding workflow exists in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: ENRICH_CURRENT — Add onboarding_status field to User model with 6-state lifecycle: invited → account_created → phone_verified → cni_uploaded → validated → active. States stored as User.onboarding_status enum.
workflows.human_decision_question: Onboarding step policy and validation requirements per step

workflows.current_limitation: V2 Organization has users+properties but no agency-level trust, validations, or lifecycle states
workflows.proposed_structure: EXTEND_CURRENT — Add lifecycle_state enum to Organization model with 6-state lifecycle: creation → validation → active → suspended → dissolution → archived

NBA_rules.nba: Documents under review by LAWIM admin

workflows.human_decision_question: Agency verification requirements and lifecycle enforcement

workflows.current_limitation: No Document entity with type, verification, or lifecycle in V2
workflows.proposed_structure: CREATE_SPECIALIZED_WORKFLOW — Implement Document entity with 6-state verification lifecycle: uploaded → pending → validated → rejected → expired → archived. Support per-transaction-type document requirements, admin validation workflow.

NBA_rules.nba: Review reason and upload corrected document
Upload new version of expired document

phase_1_core_business.description: Matching, Mise en Relation, Visit, Transaction, Paid Services, CRM Pipeline, Property Lifecycle, Dossier Lifecycle, Negotiation, Qualification

phase_2_operations.description: Disputes, Agent Invitation, Main Cross-cutting, Agent Onboarding, Organization Lifecycle, Document Verification

phase_3_analytics.description: Publication SIE, Redirection SIE, Conversion & Attribution
